LSE-HS12-L4-1400P-HSSCIENG1112-DPC-LAT-01 • HS Engineering Design 11-12 • Modeling Systems

The Mural Current

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the teacher describes the posters that way, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the posters were really doing.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-ETS1-4  |  HS Engineering Design 11-12: Modeling Systems
